intro.title: Reliability Testing
intro.description: Retail, warehouse, and industrial environments are harsh: drops, vibration, temperature swings, and daily heavy use. Reliability testing helps you reduce the most expensive issues - returns, bad reviews, and warranty claims.

checks.title: Drop tests
checks.description: 1.5m drop resistance for handheld scanners and readers.

checks.title: Vibration tests
checks.description: Transportation-simulated vibration to protect shipping integrity.

checks.title: Aging / burn-in
checks.description: 100% aging test before shipment for early-failure detection.

checks.title: Environmental tests
checks.description: High/low temperature, humidity, and salt-spray exposure.

highlight.title: Why Buyers Like This
highlight.description: Testing is not just for engineers - it's a risk-reduction tool for procurement. It gives you evidence to defend your brand.

primary.title: Ask for a Test Plan Recommendation
primary.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a practical test plan and next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify read performance and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
